scored_codes.rationale: Primary fibrolamellar hepatocellular carcinoma is a hepatic malignancy that can develop in chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Primary combined hepatocellular carcinoma and cholangiocarcinoma is a hepatic malignancy associated with chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Primary intrahepatic bile duct carcinoma is a hepatic malignancy associated with chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Primary carcinoma liver and/or biliary system is a broad category that includes hepatic malignancies associated with chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Cholangiocarcinoma of intrahepatic biliary tract is a hepatic malignancy associated with chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Malignant neoplasm of intrahepatic canaliculi is a hepatic malignancy associated with chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Fibrolamellar hepatocellular carcinoma is a hepatic malignancy that can develop in chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Pediatric hepatocellular carcinoma can develop in children with chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of COPD is unrelated to chronic hepatitis C and does not belong in this code list.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic hepatitis B is a different viral hepatitis condition and should not be included in a chronic hepatitis C code list.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic congestive heart failure is an unrelated comorbidity and does not confirm chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: This code indicates resolved COPD, which is unrelated to chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Moderate COPD is an unrelated respiratory condition with no direct connection to chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.term: Severe chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (disorder)
scored_codes.rationale: Severe COPD is an unrelated respiratory condition with no direct connection to chronic hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic persistent type B viral hepatitis is a different viral hepatitis condition (hepatitis B, not C).

scored_codes.rationale: Hepatic coma due to chronic hepatitis B is specific to hepatitis B, not hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Acute exacerbation of chronic bronchitis is an unrelated respiratory condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic kidney disease stage 3 is an unrelated renal condition that may co-occur but does not confirm hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic diastolic heart failure is an unrelated cardiac condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic heart failure is an unrelated cardiac condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic active type B viral hepatitis is specific to hepatitis B, not hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic tracheobronchitis is an unrelated respiratory condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic type B viral hepatitis is specific to hepatitis B, not hepatitis C.

scored_codes.rationale: Chronic bronchitis is an unrelated respiratory condition.

scored_codes.rationale: Occult chronic type B viral hepatitis is specific to hepatitis B, not hepatitis C.
